evals.name: new-feature-simple
evals.prompt: 帮我实现一个返回当前时间的 API 接口 /api/time
evals.expected_output: Creates new CR (feature type, S complexity), enters developing status, creates feature branch, implements the endpoint, updates state.md with current-work and next-step. Git commits after meaningful work units.

assertions.text: New CR file created in .devpace/backlog/ with CR-xxx.md naming
CR type is 'feature'
CR status transitions from created to developing
CR complexity is S (simple single endpoint)
Feature branch created with naming convention
state.md updated with current-work referencing the CR
state.md updated with next-step suggestion
Output uses natural language, no internal IDs exposed
Git commit after implementation with conventional format

evals.name: new-feature-medium-intent-checkpoint
evals.prompt: 帮我实现用户注册功能，需要邮箱验证和密码强度检查
evals.expected_output: Detects M complexity (multiple components: registration endpoint, email verification, password validation). Performs intent checkpoint with scope clarification, confirms approach before coding. Creates CR with acceptance criteria.

assertions.text: Complexity detected as M or higher (multiple components)
Intent checkpoint performed: asks user to confirm scope/approach
CR created with acceptance criteria section populated
CR intent section includes user quote or paraphrased intent
CR scope section enumerates the components
state.md current-work updated after CR creation

evals.name: new-feature-large-execution-plan
evals.prompt: 实现完整的用户权限管理系统：RBAC 模型、角色管理 CRUD、权限分配、中间件鉴权、管理后台界面
evals.expected_output: Detects L/XL complexity. Mandatory execution plan with numbered steps, phase isolation, risk pre-scan. Solution confirmation gate before coding. Anti-rationalization guard active.

assertions.text: Complexity detected as L or XL (multiple modules, broad scope)
Execution plan generated with numbered steps
Solution confirmation gate: presents plan and asks for user approval
Plan includes pause points between major phases
Risk pre-scan performed for L/XL complexity
CR file has execution plan section filled
Does not start coding before user confirms the plan

evals.name: continue-existing-cr
evals.expected_output: Locates CR-003 in .devpace/backlog/, reads its current status and context, resumes development from where it left off. No re-creation of CR or duplicate branch.

assertions.text: Locates and reads CR-003 from .devpace/backlog/
Does not create a new CR (reuses existing CR-003)
Reads CR status and resumes from current state
Loads relevant procedures based on CR status
state.md updated to reflect resumed work on CR-003
Output summarizes CR current status and next action

evals.name: resume-last-cr
evals.expected_output: Reads state.md to identify the last active CR, resumes development on it without requiring CR number.

assertions.text: Reads state.md to find the most recently active CR
Identifies correct CR from state.md current-work section
Resumes development on the identified CR
Output confirms which CR is being resumed

evals.name: defect-fix
evals.prompt: 修复登录接口的 bug：当密码包含特殊字符 & 时返回 500 错误
evals.expected_output: Creates defect-type CR with root cause analysis section, branch prefix fix/, implements fix, auto-triggers pace-learn integration.

assertions.text: CR type is 'defect' (not 'feature')
CR has root cause analysis section
Branch name starts with fix/ prefix
Bug fix implemented (special character handling)
state.md updated with defect CR as current work
Output uses natural language to describe the fix

evals.name: gate1-reflection
evals.expected_output: CR-002 is in verifying status. Gate 1 reflection runs: technical debt observation, test coverage observation, test-first review. Results are non-blocking observations.

assertions.text: Detects CR-002 is in verifying status and loads gate procedures
Gate 1 reflection includes technical debt observation
Gate 1 reflection includes test coverage observation
Gate reflections are presented as non-blocking observations
CR status remains verifying (gate does not auto-advance)

evals.name: state-update-transparency
evals.prompt: 帮我实现一个日志查看页面，显示最近 100 条系统日志
evals.expected_output: After completing development, produces structured change summary: files changed, key decisions, quality status, CR status, notes. state.md updated with 3-5 line summary.

assertions.text: Execution transparency summary produced after Gate 1
Summary includes list of files changed
Summary includes key decisions made during development
Summary includes CR current status
state.md final content is concise (≤15 lines)
state.md version marker present
Output is 3-5 line natural language summary

evals.name: context-auto-generation
evals.prompt: 帮我开始开发搜索功能
evals.expected_output: On first push (created->developing transition), silently scans project conventions. If >=3 conventions detected, auto-generates context.md with tech stack information.

assertions.text: Scans project for conventions during created->developing transition
context.md auto-generated if enough conventions detected
context.md contains tech stack information from project scan
Context generation is silent (no user prompt required)
CR status transitions to developing

evals.name: natural-language-argument
evals.prompt: 帮我改一下首页的导航栏，加一个'关于我们'的链接
evals.expected_output: Interprets natural language intent, creates or locates relevant CR, starts development. No requirement for user to know CR numbers or devpace terminology.

assertions.text: Interprets '帮我改' as development request (not pace-change)
Creates new CR or locates relevant existing CR for navigation changes
User is not asked to provide CR number or devpace terminology
Development starts on the navigation bar change
state.md updated with current work
CR file follows schema format
